---
title: "Template"
format: html
execute: 
  eval: false
---

## Constant

Path to data:

```{r}
path2data <- paste0("C:/Users/ongph/github/data")
```

Files names:

```{r}
cases_file <- "measles/measles_cases_2019-12.2025.xlsx"
map_distric_file <- "map/gadm41_hcmc_district.rds"
```

## Packages

Required packages:

```{r}
# Edit this only
required <- c("readxl", "tidyverse", "janitor")
```

Installing those that are not installed yet:

```{r}
to_install <- required[! required %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install)
```

Loading the packages for interactive use:

```{r}
invisible(sapply(required, library, character.only = TRUE))
```

## Functions

```{r}
source("code/inhouse_sero.R")
```


## Data

Case report data:

```{r}
df_case <- file.path(path2data, cases_file) |> 
  read_excel(sheet = 4, col_types = "text") |> 
  clean_names() |> 
  mutate(ngay_nv = as.Date(as.numeric(ngay_nv), origin = "1899-12-30"))
```

Map:
